title: HOOK — empty coffee bag
prompt: Tight shot in @kitchen, soft morning light from the window. @Mama on the LEFT stands at the counter holding @empty-coffee-bag upside down — a sad puff of coffee dust falls onto the granite. Mama's face freezes mid-yawn into wide-eyed silent horror. @Sara on the RIGHT sits at the kitchen island in pajamas, mid-bite of toast, sees the look. Sara (eyebrow raised, careful): "...Mama? Are you okay?" Mama (slow, voice cracking, eyes locked forward): "We have to go." Sara (toast paused, alarmed): "Where?" Mama (whispered): "...COSTCO."
